input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.6.1
            TITLE: conduct

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.6.1: Conduct
IN.6.1 Conduct  
The Driver Template shown in F.5.6.4 will be positioned as given in F.5.6.5

RULE: in.6
            TITLE: driver template inspections

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.6: DRIVER TEMPLATE INSPECTIONS
IN.6 DRIVER TEMPLATE INSPECTIONS 
The Driver Template Inspection will be conducted as part of the Mechanical Inspection

RULE: in.6.2
            TITLE: driver template clearance criteria

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.6.2: Driver Template Clearance Criteria
IN.6.2 Driver Template Clearance Criteria 
To pass Mechanical Technical Inspection, the Driver Template must meet the clearance 
specified in F.5.6.3

final_answer: DRIVER TEMPLATE INSPECTIONS IN.6 DRIVER TEMPLATE INSPECTIONS The Driver Template Inspection will be conducted as part of the Mechanical Inspection
